<!-- Thank you for contributing to Node.js! -->
<!-- Please fill out the sections below to help us review your PR. -->

## Description

<!-- Describe the changes you've made and why. -->

## Related Issues

<!-- Link any related issues here, e.g. Fixes #1234 -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] Test addition or update
- [ ] Build/CI change

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING](../CONTRIBUTING.md) guidelines
- [ ] My code follows the code style of this project
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published

## Testing

<!-- Describe how you tested your changes. -->
<!-- Include instructions so reviewers can reproduce. -->

```
# Example test commands
npm test
./node test/parallel/test-my-feature.js
```

## Additional Notes
